channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Madhya Pradesh HC grants bail to men arrested for pro-Iran social media post
item.description: In Madhya Pradesh, the High Court has granted bail to two men, Wasim Khan and Yousuf Mehafooz, who were arrested in Raisen district last month for appearing in an Instagram reel that expressed support...

item.title: Northern Ontario Discusses Retrofit Strategies at EarthCare Breakfast
item.description: An EarthCare breakfast event recently took place in Northern Ontario, focusing on the crucial topic of building retrofits. The event aimed to explore strategies and opportunities for improving the ene...

item.title: Fixing Kenya's weak institutions is key to winning the fight against corruption
item.description: The article argues that Kenya will never fully defeat corruption as long as the underlying systems in government remain weak, fragmented, and easily abused. The author points out that the country alre...

item.title: How rising oil prices expose the precarious conditions of platform workers in the Philippines
item.description: Ang artikulong ito ay naglalahad ng epekto ng pagtaas ng presyo ng langis sa mga platform worker sa Pilipinas, tulad ng mga driver ng Grab, Foodpanda, Maxim, Lalamove, at iba pang transport at deliver...

item.title: Agnes Kagure Outlines Support Plan for Juakali Traders Ahead of Nairobi Governor Race
item.description: Businesswoman and politician Agnes Kagure has outlined a transformative agenda for Nairobi as she vies for the governor's seat in the 2027 General Election. Recent opinion polls indicate a close race ...

item.title: Suspended EMPD Deputy Chief Refutes Kidnapping Allegations Against Spokesperson
item.description: Julius Mkhwanazi, the suspended deputy chief of the Ekurhuleni Metro Police Department (EMPD), has denied any involvement in the alleged kidnapping and attacks on his departmental spokesperson, Kelebo...

item.title: Katoo Ole Metito Signals Intent to Contest Kajiado Governorship Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: State House Comptroller Katoo ole Metito has indicated he may return to elective politics, targeting the Kajiado gubernatorial seat in the 2027 elections. Metito, who served as Kajiado South MP from 2...

item.title: Sheryl Gabriella Reflects on Her Relationship with a Generous Older Partner
item.description: TikTok content creator Sheryl Gabriella recently shared her experience of dating a 43-year-old man from the US back in 2023 when she was just 22. According to Sheryl, the man was very generous and sup...

item.title: Montreal protesters challenge arrests during Scotiabank sit-in over Elbit investment
item.description: In Montreal, hearings have started for a Charter challenge led by pro-Palestinian protesters who were arrested during a sit-in at a downtown Scotiabank branch in April 2024. The demonstration involved...

item.title: Makati City Introduces P20 Rice Program for Vulnerable Sectors
item.description: The Makati City local government, in coordination with the Department of Agriculture (DA), has launched a P20-per-kilo rice program aimed at easing the burden of rising food prices on vulnerable commu...

item.title: American Cola host first-ever Women’s Basketball tournament in Lagos
item.description: American Cola Courtside 2026 don mark another milestone as the brand organize im first-ever women’s basketball tournament wey happen for Ilupeju Basketball Court, Lagos. The five-week event bring toge...

item.title: Court Bars Kakamega Governor’s Wife from Making Alleged Defamatory Remarks Against Woman Rep Elsie Muhanda
item.description: A political row in Kakamega County has now reached the courts, after Woman Representative Elsie Muhanda filed a defamation case against Professor Janet Kassily Barasa, the wife of Governor Fernandes B...

item.title: Roelf Meyer appointed as South Africa’s new ambassador to the United States
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has officially appointed Roelf Meyer as South Africa's ambassador to the United States. This appointment comes after the country had been without a Washington ambassador sinc...

item.title: Sindh reports 25 mpox cases with local transmission increasing
item.description: Karachi and Khairpur have reported two additional mpox cases, bringing Sindh's total to 25 cases this year, including nine fatalities. Health officials confirmed that all current cases are due to loca...

item.title: Mother sentenced to over two years in prison for organising cover-up after son's hit-and-run that injured six-year-old boy
item.description: A mother from North Wales has been sentenced to 26 months in prison for her leading role in a family conspiracy to pervert the course of justice following a hit-and-run incident involving her son. On ...

item.title: Angus Taylor's immigration speech reveals Liberal Party strategy and challenges
item.description: On April 15, 2026, Angus Taylor delivered a speech on immigration at the Menzies Research Centre, which revealed more about the current Liberal Party leadership's political manoeuvring than concrete p...

item.title: Treasurer Jim Chalmers meets international counterparts to secure Australia’s fuel supply amid global oil instability
item.description: Australia’s Treasurer, Jim Chalmers, has flown to Washington DC to discuss fuel security with key international suppliers and financial institutions including the IMF and World Bank. The move comes as...

item.title: King Charles to meet Trump in the US to strengthen bilateral relations amid tensions
item.description: King Charles III and Queen Camilla will visit the United States on April 27 for a four-day state visit marking the 250th anniversary of US independence. While the trip has ceremonial significance, it ...

item.title: Sara Duterte’s lawyer denies ex-aide’s claim of ₱125 million confidential fund release
item.description: The legal camp of Vice President Sara Duterte on Wednesday rejected the accusation that ₱125 million in confidential funds were released within 24 hours under her instruction. Duterte’s lawyer, Atty. ...

item.title: The Impact of Gender Identity Debates on International Efforts to Protect Violence Survivors
item.description: The recent debate over gender identity at the 70th session of the U.N. Commission on the Status of Women illustrates a broader international struggle over defining gender in policy. A U.S. delegate pr...
